at0000.1.description: A generic section header which should be renamed in a template to suit a specific clinical context.
Образец заголовка раздела
Un encabezado de sección de tipo genérico que será renombrado en una plantilla para su empleo en un contexto clínico específico.
Naslov sekcije
En generisk seksjonsoverskrift som skal gis nytt navn i en templat for å passe i en gitt klinisk kontekst.
Um cabeçalho de sessão genérico que deve ser renomeado no template para adequar-se a um contexto clínico específico.
En allmän avsnittsrubrik som döps om i en openEHR-mall för att passa in i en specifik klinisk kontext.
Eine generische Abschnittsüberschrift eines Templates, welche entsprechend dem spezifischen klinischen Kontext umbenannt werden sollte.
Un'intestazione di sezione generica che dovrebbe essere rinominata in un template per adattarsi ad uno specifico contesto clinico.
Un en-tête de section générique qui doit être renommé dans un modèle pour s'adapter à un contexte clinique spécifique.

author.name: Nadim Anani, Darin Leonhardt
author.organisation: Health Informatics Centre, Karolinska Institutet, Sweden, PLRI für medizinische Informatik/ Medizinische Hochschule

translations.accreditation: fluent in both English and German, Medical Informatics 'MSc' degree from Heidelberg, 2 years professional experience in health informatics, some translation experience, openEHR knowledge.

author.name: Clara Calleja Vega
author.organisation: CatSalut. Servei Català de la Salut.

author.name: Clara Calleja Vega
author.organisation: CatSalut. Servei Català de la Salut.

at0000.1.description: Narrative summary or overview about a patient, specifically from the perspective of a healthcare provider, and with or without associated interpretations.

at0002.1.description: The summary, assessment, conclusions or evaluation of the clinical findings.

at0000.1.description: خلاصه یا مروری تشریحی دربازه بیمار بویژه از نظز ارایه کننده مراقبت بهداشتی با یا بدون تفسیرهای مربوطه
ملخص بالرواية أو نظرة عامة عن المريض, خاصة من وجهة نظر مقدم الخدمة الصحية, مع إرفاق أو عدم إرفاق تفسيرات
Zusammenfassung oder Übersicht einer Patientengeschichte, speziell aus der Sicht eines Gesundheitsdienstleisters, evtl. mit dazugehörigen Interpretationen.
Sumario narrativo o visión global acerca de un paciente, específicamente desde la perspectiva de un profesional del cuidado de la salud, con o sin interpretaciones asociadas.
Resumo narrativo ou visão geral sobre um paciente, especificamente a partir da perspectiva de um profissional de saúde, e com ou sem interpretações associadas.
从医疗保健服务提供着的角度，手工综合并记录关于患者的叙述型摘要或概述，且带有或没有相关联的解释。
Fritekstsammendrag eller oversikt om en pasient fra helsepersonellets perspektiv, med eller uten tilhørende fortolkninger.
Beskrivande sammanfattning eller överblick av en patient, särskilt ur vårdgivarens perspektiv, med eller utan associerade tolkningar.
Informe o resum narratiu sobre un pacient, específicament des de la perspectiva d'un professional d’atenció sanitària, i amb o sense interpretacions associades.
Resumen narrativo o visión general sobre un paciente, específicamente desde la perspectiva de un profesional sanitario, y con o sin interpretaciones asociadas.
Αφηγηματική περίληψη ή επισκόπηση σχετικά με έναν ασθενή, ειδικά από την οπτική γωνία ενός παρόχου υγειονομικής περίθαλψης και με ή χωρίς σχετικές ερμηνείες.
Résumé narratif ou aperçu concernant un patient, spécifiquement du point de vue d'un professionnel de santé, accompagné ou non d'interprétations associées.

author.name: Nadim Anani, Darin Leonhardt
author.organisation: Health Informatics Centre, Karolinska Institutet, Sweden, PLRI für medizinische Informatik/ Medizinische Hochschule

at0000.1.description: Summary information about social circumstances or experiences that may have a potential impact on an individual's health.

at0002.1.description: Narrative description about social circumstances or experiences that may have a potential impact on an individual's health.
at0002.1.comment: May be used to record a narrative summary of the complete social circumstances or experiences or key aspects of the social summary, which will be supported by additional structured data, or to import textual data from existing/legacy clinical systems. Details of specific structured findings can be included using CLUSTER archetypes in the 'Details' slot.

author.name: John Tore Valand og Silje Ljosland Bakke

at0000.1.description: Summary information about social circumstances or experiences that may have a potential impact on an individual's health.

at0002.1.description: Narrative description about social circumstances or experiences that may have a potential impact on an individual's health.

Details of specific structured findings can be included using CLUSTER archetypes in the 'Details' slot.

at0000.1.description: Oppsummerende informasjon om sosiale omstendigheter eller erfaringer som kan ha en innvirkning på et individs helse.
Informazioni sintetiche su circostanze o esperienze sociali che possono avere un potenziale impatto sulla salute di un individuo.
